title: Karnataka birth and death statistics for Mangaluru, Dakshina Kannada, and nearby areas
description: Clean public-facing CSVs derived from Karnataka Civil Registration System annual reports.
notes: Public files use portable source references.
source_id joins each data row to source_manifest.csv.
This is a PDF-derived public data extract, not an official machine-readable CRS release.

dakshina_kannada.description: Dakshina Kannada district and Mangaluru City rows.

surrounding_districts_and_towns.description: Comparator district and town rows from surrounding/coastal Karnataka areas.
